title: M10 Mastery Check — Code Efficacy Assessment

tasks.title: Run the Five-Question Framework on a Code Sample
success_criteria: Q1: PASS — workspace_id comes from req.workspace.id (via verified middleware)
Q2: FAIL — no Zod safeParse on req.body before handler logic (P2)
Q3: FAIL — logAuditEvent is called AFTER the AI provider call (P1)
Q4: N/A — no bcrypt in this handler
Q5: N/A — no refresh token in this handler

tasks.title: Write a Gap Report Entry
tasks.prompt: Write a structured gap report entry for the Q3 violation found in MC10-T1. Include: Gap ID, Question number, File (use a placeholder), Line number (estimate), Description, Risk, and the specific code fix.
success_criteria: Description explains audit log called after provider, not before
Risk: AI actions not logged if provider throws
Fix: move logAuditEvent to before llmRouter.complete()
